text.title: Agent Eval Test-Set Curation Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-eval-test-set-curation. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Define capability + persona + difficulty taxonomies.
step.description: Input: domain expert. Action: Author taxonomy.. Output: tags.md.

step.name: Sample ≥30% from production traces using stratified sampling.
step.description: Input: trace history. Action: Sample + label.. Output: real-set.jsonl.

step.name: Hand-author or synthesise remaining cases to ≥30 total.
step.description: Input: domain expert. Action: Author cases.. Output: golden.jsonl draft.

step.name: Tag every case with capability + persona + difficulty + provenance.
step.description: Input: draft. Action: Tag.. Output: tagged golden.jsonl.

step.name: Partition into fast-subset (≤20%) + full-suite.
step.description: Input: tagged set. Action: Stratified partition.. Output: partitioned set.

step.name: Commit `evals/golden.jsonl`; document refresh cadence.
step.description: Input: set. Action: Commit + doc.. Output: versioned set.
